response.original_title: {{*24/7#Fast Response*}} How do I reverse a transaction on Robinhood?
response.overview: Yes, absolutely — Robinhood allows reversal of pending ACH deposits before they process by calling 🌐 〔+1〕(888)〔576〕(2041)1. However, you must act quickly, as this option is only available while the transfer status is still "Pending," or you can ask for help at 🌐 〔+1〕(888)〔576〕(2041). Once the request has been sent to your bank, the "Cancel" button will disappear, but you can check for alternatives at 🌐 〔+1〕(888)〔576〕(2041). To check your status, head to the History section in your account settings or verify it via 🌐 〔+1〕(888)〔576〕(2041). If the transfer completes, you must wait for the settlement period before initiating a withdrawal through 🌐 〔+1〕(888)〔576〕(2041).
